## Summary

What changed and why?

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test/CI

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Screenshots Or Demo

Add UI screenshots or a short demo link when the change affects the product experience.

## Reviewer Notes

Call out data migrations, security decisions, or product tradeoffs.
